latin: Uxor mariti scripta invenit. in omnibus foliis eadem verba scripta erant: 'omne opus sine ludo Iacobum puerum hebetem facit.' centies et centies repetita.

questions.target: The same sentence written hundreds of times
choices: The same sentence written hundreds of times

questions.prompt: What does the repeated sentence say?
questions.target: All work and no play makes Jack a dull boy
choices: All work and no play makes Jack a dull boy

translation: The wife found her husband's writings. On every page the same words were written: 'All work and no play makes Jack a dull boy.' Repeated hundreds and hundreds of times.
